nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the Coding Agent Context extension for the Spec Kit system — manages managed sections in coding agent context files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, etc.) with configurable start/end markers, supporting opt-out, custom markers, and hook-driven auto-refresh on specify/plan.

nodes.name: agent-context-config.yml
nodes.summary: Configures the target coding agent context file (AGENTS.md) and the HTML comment delimiters (<!-- SPECKIT START --> / <!-- SPECKIT END -->) that bracket the managed Spec Kit section.

nodes.name: extension.yml
nodes.summary: Extension manifest declaring the agent-context extension identity (v1.0.0), schema version, required Speckit version (>=0.2.0), provided command (speckit.agent-context.update), and lifecycle hooks (after_specify, after_plan).
